 {"id":"frankenredis-9jl4","title":"v8s5 part a: document upstream DUMP/RESTORE payload format (fr-store reference)","description":"Preparation sub-bead for br-frankenredis-v8s5. Extract the upstream DUMP payload layout from legacy_redis_code/redis/src/cluster.c::dumpCommand + rdb.c::rdbSaveObject + restoreCommand + rdb.c::rdbLoadObject and write it up as crates/fr-store/docs/dump-format.md.

Scope:
  * Overall payload: type_byte + rdbSaveObject + version (u16 LE) + CRC64 (u64 LE).
  * Version field semantics (currently upstream is version 11 for 7.2.x, 12 for 7.4.x).
  * Per-type rdbSaveObject layout for STRING/LIST_QUICKLIST_2/SET_INTSET/SET_LISTPACK/HASH_LISTPACK/HASH_METADATA/ZSET_LISTPACK/STREAM_LISTPACKS_3.
  * CRC64 polynomial (Redis CRC64 with the Jones polynomial, already implemented at crates/fr-persist/src/lib.rs:848).
  * A comparison table: current frankenredis-internal layout vs upstream expectation, field-by-field.

No code changes.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-24T00:17:59.107620059Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-24T06:25:27.010533000Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"closed_at":"2026-04-24T06:25:27.010533000Z","close_reason":"Documented upstream DUMP/RESTORE payload format in crates/fr-store/docs/dump-format.md (8ae2166)."}

 {"id":"frankenredis-9vl3","title":"EPIC: Harden security beyond RESP parsing — persistence integrity, connection auth, and adversarial resilience","description":"# Security Hardening Epic

## Why
AGENTS.md Security Doctrine requires: "Defend against malformed protocol frames, replay/order attacks, and persistence tampering." The reality check found:
- RESP parser correctly rejects malformed frames ✓
- CRC64 checksums on RDB files ✓  
- No evidence of replay attack defense beyond basic auth
- No evidence of persistence tampering detection beyond CRC64
- No adversarial fuzzing of the RESP parser or command handlers
- No rate limiting or connection throttling

## What Success Looks Like
- Fuzz test for RESP parser (catches crashes on malformed input)
- Fuzz test for RDB decoder (catches crashes on corrupted files)
- AOF integrity verification (detect truncation/corruption on load)
- Documentation of threat model per AGENTS.md requirements","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-04-07T03:12:49.951225550Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-07T20:14:21.928344033Z","closed_at":"2026-04-07T20:14:21.928152231Z","close_reason":"All sub-tasks complete: RESP parser fuzz (29c7, 40K inputs), RDB/AOF decoder fuzz (9zk5, 30K inputs), threat model documentation (fap1, 6 subsystems).
